errors.laserOverheated: Oh no! Your laser cannon overheated from shooting too fast! You need to move before you can shoot a second time.
errors.missedShot: Oh no, you missed. Wasting ammo is not allowed!
errors.moveOffEdge: Oh no, you tried to move off the edge!
errors.rowNotNumber: Oh no, the row input you provided is not a number.
errors.rowOutOfRange: Oh no, you tried to access a row of aliens that doesn't exist. You asked for row {{row}}, but there are only {{total}} rows of aliens.
errors.notAllAliensDead: You need to defeat all the aliens before you can celebrate!
